summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Restaurant QR Management System - All backend APIs (25/25 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Tested: Auth, Expenses, Discounts, Reservations, Financial Analytics, Menus, and Admin Dashboard navigation.

minor.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning)

action_items: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints are properly secured with role-based access control
WebSocket implementation for real-time updates is in place
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded from responses
All UI components have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test expenses, discounts, and menus during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Login, Owner Dashboard (Venues, Tables, Categories, Menus, Users, Settings), Admin Dashboard (Active Tables, Reservations, Users, Expenses, Analytics, Financial Report, Discounts). WebSocket is implemented for Kitchen/Waiter real-time notifications. UI is in Azerbaijani language.

features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Owner login with credentials owner/owner123 works correctly
features_tested.owner_dashboard: PASS - All menu items accessible: Məkanlar, Stollar, Kateqoriya/Yeməklər, Menyular, İstifadəçilər, Parametrlər
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - All pages accessible: Aktiv stollar, Rezervasiyalar, İstifadəçilər, Xərclər, Analitika, Maliyyə Hesabatı, Endirimlər
features_tested.expenses_crud: PASS - Create, Read, Update, Delete expenses working
features_tested.discounts_crud: PASS - Create, Read, Update, Delete, Toggle discounts working
features_tested.reservations_crud: PASS - Create, Read, Update status, Delete reservations working
features_tested.financial_report: PASS - Shows revenue, expenses, net profit, expense breakdown by category
features_tested.professional_analytics: PASS - Shows orders, customers, preparation/delivery times, top waiter
features_tested.menus_crud: PASS - Create, Read, Update, Delete menus working
